records.rationale: Critical weed-free period 14–42 days after sowing (wheat genotype-10 study).
Anthesis fungicide timing for Fusarium head blight (reduces disease 15–30%).
Scab (Fusarium) attacks when rain coincides with flowering — the disease-sensitive stage.
